mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO file_reference (file_id, user_id, file_name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{r.fileId}, #{r.userId}, #{r.fileName}, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT id, file_id, user_id, file_name, created_at, updated_at FROM file_reference WHERE file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY id ASC
